# Potato

> Potato is a free, open-source, self-hosted annotation and agent-evaluation
> platform for NLP, agentic, and GenAI research. Tasks are configured entirely in
> YAML (no coding) to annotate text, audio, video, images, documents, and AI agent
> traces. It also provides a full agent-evaluation loop — programmatic evaluators,
> versioned datasets and experiments, automation rules, CI gating, LLM-as-judge
> calibration, semantic curation, and a multi-model arena — as a free, self-hosted
> alternative to LangSmith, LabelBox, and Braintrust.

Website: https://www.potatoannotator.com · Docs: https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io ·
Code: https://github.com/davidjurgens/potato · Paper: EMNLP 2022 (System Demonstrations).

## Start here

- [What is Potato / FAQ](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/faq/): direct answers to common questions
- [Glossary](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/glossary/): annotation & agent-evaluation terms defined
- [Quick Start](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/quick-start/): install and run in 5 minutes
- [Comparison with other tools](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/comparison/): Potato vs Label Studio, Prodigy, LangSmith, LabelBox

## Agent / agentic evaluation

- [Agent Evaluation Guide](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/guides/agent-evaluation-guide/): evaluate agent trajectories, tool calls, and outputs
- [Programmatic Evaluators](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/agent-evaluation/evaluators/): trajectory match, tool-use, LLM-judge, heuristics
- [Datasets & Experiments](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/agent-evaluation/datasets_and_experiments/): versioned eval sets + experiment runs
- [Automation Rules](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/agent-evaluation/automation_rules/): route incoming traces to queues/datasets/evaluators
- [CI Evaluation](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/agent-evaluation/ci_evaluation/): gate CI on eval-score regressions (pytest)
- [LLM-as-Judge Alignment](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/agent-evaluation/judge_alignment/): measure & auto-calibrate judges against human gold
- [Model Arena](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/agent-evaluation/model_arena/): compare N models side by side
- [Tracing SDK](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/integrations/tracing_sdk/): instrument agents with @traceable

## Annotation

- [Schema Gallery](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/annotation-types/schemas_and_templates/): all 20+ annotation types
- [Configuration Reference](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/configuration/config_reference/): every config option
- [Quality Control](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/workflow/quality_control/): IAA, gold standards, attention checks
- [Crowdsourcing](https://potatoannotator.readthedocs.io/en/latest/deployment/crowdsourcing/): MTurk & Prolific integration
